Home / Lore / People / Aaron Keener

person

Aaron Keener

A first-wave Division Agent who went rogue and became the central target of the Warlords of New York manhunt.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

From Agent to rogue

Keener begins as a first-wave SHD Agent and becomes a rogue actor whose plans connect the original game to The Division 2's return to New York. [1]

Warlords of New York

By the expansion's opening premise, Keener controls Lower Manhattan through rogue lieutenants and aligned factions, and SHD holds him responsible for a new biological attack. [2][3]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Aaron Keener is identified as a rogue first-wave Division Agent who worked with the Last Man Battalion and other rogue Agents. [1]

  2. confirmed

    The Warlords of New York premise places Keener in control of Lower Manhattan after uniting New York factions under his banner. [2]

  3. confirmed

    The expansion overview attributes a recent Lower Manhattan biological attack to Keener and says SHD believes he is planning further attacks. [3]

Related records

  • Strategic Homeland Divisionformer member of
  • Lower Manhattan Biological Attackcauses

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] Tom Clancy's The Division 2: Warlords of New York Expansion — Ubisoft (undated). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  3. [3] Warlords of New York Expansion Overview — Ubisoft (2020-02-11). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: This version deliberately stops at the Warlords of New York opening premise; later seasonal status changes need a separate current-canon review.
